case_title: DE SOTO COMPANY VS. BENJAMIN LIANG

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2014 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,230.45 FILED BY DE SOTO COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, BENJAMIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE SOTO COMPANY
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-16-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-11-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE SOTO COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIANG, BENJAMIN $3,230.45 PRINCIPAL, $203.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,433.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$153.00) SERVED AUG-12-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LIANG, BENJAMIN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE SOTO COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-16-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-16-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY STEVE SHATZ--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
